title: The Ghost Train at Platform 0
description: A midnight-only train visits the abandoned station. Board it, hear the conductor out, and decide what to do with the lost timetable.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Read the loose timetable on the platform
The train only stops between 22:00 and 04:00

return_ticket.text: You return the timetable. The conductor pins a platform-ticket to your lapel and waves the train on.

keep_ticket.text: You pocket the timetable. The train leaves without a whistle and the platform lamp flickers out.

neutral.text: You watch the train go. A cold wind carries the smell of old paper.
